description: This is a test ticket created during production testing to verify the Turso database integration is working correctly.

title: Add Dark Mode Theme Support
description:
Users have requested a dark mode option for the support hub interface. This would improve usability in low-light environments and provide a more modern user experience. The dark mode should:

• Toggle between light and dark themes
• Remember user preference in localStorage
• Apply to all pages (tickets, knowledge base, admin)
• Use accessible color contrast ratios
• Include smooth transitions between themes

title: Email Notifications for Ticket Updates
description:
Implement email notifications to keep users informed about ticket status changes. This feature should include:

• Email when ticket status changes (pending → in-progress → completed)
• Notification when admin adds comments
• Daily digest of ticket activity for admins
• User preference settings to control notification frequency
• Professional email templates with branding
• Integration with popular email services (SendGrid, AWS SES)

title: File Attachment Support for Tickets
description:
Add the ability to attach files to support tickets. This would help users provide screenshots, logs, and documents to better explain their issues. Requirements:

• Support common file types (images, PDFs, text files, logs)
• File size limit of 10MB per attachment
• Multiple attachments per ticket
• Secure file storage and access
• Thumbnail previews for images
• Download tracking for analytics

title: Advanced Search and Filtering
description:
Enhance the ticket and knowledge base search capabilities with advanced filtering options:

• Full-text search across tickets and articles
• Filter by ticket status, priority, type, and date range
• Filter knowledge base by category and tags
• Save frequently used search filters
• Export search results to CSV
• Search suggestions and autocomplete
• Search analytics to improve content

title: Mobile App for iOS and Android
description:
Develop native mobile applications for iOS and Android to provide on-the-go access to the support system. Features should include:

• Submit and track tickets from mobile devices
• Push notifications for ticket updates
• Offline mode for viewing previously loaded content
• Camera integration for easy photo attachments
• Touch-optimized interface
• Admin features for mobile ticket management
• Biometric authentication support

title: Analytics and Reporting Dashboard
description:
Create a comprehensive analytics dashboard for administrators to track support metrics and performance:

• Ticket volume and resolution time trends
• Most common issue categories and patterns
• Knowledge base article popularity and effectiveness
• Customer satisfaction ratings and feedback
• Team performance metrics and workload distribution
• Exportable reports (PDF, Excel)
• Custom date ranges and filtering options
• Real-time data visualization with charts and graphs

title: AI-Powered Support Assistant
description:
Integrate an AI assistant to help users find solutions and assist support agents:

• Intelligent ticket routing based on content analysis
• Suggested knowledge base articles for common issues
• Auto-generated ticket summaries
• Chatbot for initial user support and FAQ answers
• Sentiment analysis for ticket prioritization
• Smart reply suggestions for support agents
• Integration with popular AI services (OpenAI, Google AI)

title: Single Sign-On (SSO) Integration
description:
Implement SSO integration to streamline user authentication and improve security:

• Support for popular SSO providers (Google, Microsoft, Okta, Auth0)
• SAML 2.0 and OAuth 2.0 protocol support
• Automatic user provisioning and role assignment
• Multi-factor authentication (MFA) support
• Session management and automatic logout
• Admin controls for SSO configuration
• Fallback to local authentication if needed
